subcodes.title: Message to humanity, through a journal editor, spoken at Milburn home in Chicago, 1912-11-03
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that the centuries of darkness have passed.... Glad tidings, glad tidings, that the Sun of Truth has shed its radiance!
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله قرون ظلمانى گذشت قرن نورانى آمد الحمد الله آثار اوهام و تقالید زائل شد و عقول
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @oneness; unity of religion, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @spiritual transformation, @The Holy Spirit
